who: restaurant inventory managers processing 10-20 inventory reports/week
offer: For restaurant inventory managers processing 10-20 inventory reports/week, inaccurate inventory tracking causes overstocking and waste. We provide weekly inventory usage reports instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory tracking leads to overstocking and waste.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant inventory managers
Indie Hackers posts on inventory management workflows
DM outreach to restaurant inventory managers with demo video
Community forums where inventory managers share tools
try_it: Let users try weekly inventory report generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual data entry
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
